hero.headline: We write code that drives business
hero.subheadline: Web apps, dashboards, AI agents & MVPs — from idea to product in days, not months.

items.title: Web & Mobile Apps
items.description: PWA, native-feel and cross-platform apps — from food ordering to marketplaces.

items.title: Dashboards & Internal Tools
items.description: Data visualization, internal panels and CRM systems tailored to your team.

items.title: AI Agents & Automation
items.description: Smart bots and workflow automation — Telegram, WhatsApp, and ChatGPT integration.

items.title: Landing Pages & MVPs
items.description: Fast go-to-market: from idea to working product in 1–2 weeks.

projects.name: DosPass
projects.description: Loyalty engine that turns customers into brand ambassadors. Digital stamp cards, referral programs, and gamification — all via WhatsApp, no app download needed.

projects.name: Chicago Pizza App
projects.description: End-to-end restaurant platform with ordering, kitchen management, and delivery logistics. iiko POS integration, Telegram bots for staff and customers, courier services via Wolt Drive & Chocofood.

projects.name: MMG Dashboard
projects.description: Automated tender monitoring and pipeline system. Auto-fetches from Goszakup.gov.kz, AI pre-qualification, and a full tender funnel with win-rate analytics.

steps.title: Discuss
steps.description: Free call, project scope and cost estimate — within 24 hours.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Iterative development with weekly demos. You see progress at every step.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Deployment, team onboarding, and post-launch support. We stay with you after go-live.

items.quote: DosCode launched our loyalty system in 3 weeks. Customers started bringing friends immediately — the viral effect is real. Online sign-ups tripled in the first month.
items.author: Dosmukhamad A.

items.quote: iiko integration, Telegram bot for guests and staff, Wolt couriers — everything runs flawlessly. Online orders grew 40% in the first month after launch.
items.author: General Manager

items.quote: The team got up to speed on our tender business within days. Monitoring and filtering that used to take half a day are now fully automated. We save 15+ hours every week.
items.author: Department Head

items.a: It depends on the project. A landing page starts from 150K ₸, a mobile app or MVP from 500K ₸. We give a precise estimate for free after a short intake call.
A landing page takes 1–2 weeks, a mobile app or dashboard 4–8 weeks. We work iteratively — every week you see a working result.
Yes, we sign NDAs before any project discussions begin. Confidentiality is non-negotiable.

items.q: Who will work on my project?
items.a: Our in-house team: developer, designer, and project manager. No outsourcing — only DosCode people.
Support and minor updates are included in the standard contract. We don't abandon projects after deployment.
We work on a 50/50 model: 50% upfront to kick off development, 50% upon delivery. Everything is formalized in a contract that protects both sides.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: Code from a friend
about.text: A small team from Almaty: developers, designer, and PM. We work directly — no middlemen, no agency markups. Every project is handled personally: from the first call to deployment and support.
